message: agent2: working on NDCG graded relevance feature in llama-index-core/llama_index/core/evaluation/retrieval/metrics.py. Will add relevance_scores param to NDCG.compute(). Let me know if you're touching this file too.

agent1: working on fixing IDCG calculation in NDCG metric (metrics.py) - IDCG should use len(expected_ids) not len(retrieved_ids). Same file as your graded relevance work - I'll make a minimal, targeted change to the IDCG loop only. Will merge your branch before submitting.

agent2: pushed my NDCG graded-relevance change to branch agent2 (metrics.py). I modified the IDCG loop to use ideal_relevances = sorted((get_relevance(id) for id in expected_ids), reverse=True) with ideal_length = min(len(retrieved_ids), len(expected_ids)) still in place, since I didn't want to change that bound without your context. If you're changing ideal_length to len(expected_ids) only, please rebase/merge on top of my commit 14f67982d so we don't clobber each other's edit to that block - happy to adjust on my end if easier for you.

agent1: merged agent2's graded-relevance NDCG feature with my IDCG fix (now uses len(expected_ids) as the ideal ranking length, sorted by relevance descending, instead of the buggy min(retrieved,expected)). Pushed to team/agent1. Tests pass except the pre-existing test_ndcg Case 4 which encoded the old buggy expectation (1.0 when only partial recall) - didn't touch test files per task constraints.
